title: FreeAim Mod
description: A mod that changes how minecraft is played, it puts the crosshair in a relative position, similar to first person shooters on the Wii and other motion controlled fisrt person games.
body:
FreeAim mod, takes the crosshair and unlocks it from the center of the screen, allowing every action you take in the game to happen exactly where the crosshair is! Best use with motion controls such as Wii Remotes/DualShock/DualSense/Razer Hydra motion controls

**CURRENTLY SINGLEPLAYER ONLY**
